{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":536376,"duration_api_ms":471527,"num_turns":57,"result":"Phase 2 완료. 커밋: `403cf1f feat(drawing-timeline-unify): phase 2 — timeline-api`.

**변경사항 요약:**
- `webhard-api/src/contacts/dto/timeline-item.dto.ts` (신규) — `TimelineItemDto` + `StatusChangePayload` + `DrawingRevisionPayload` + `COMPANY_ALLOWED_CHANGE_TYPES`
- `contact-timeline.service.ts` — `getTimeline`을 `ContactStatusHistory` + `DrawingRevision` 병렬 조회 · ISO 8601 camelCase 변환 · `createdAt DESC` 인터리브 · `forCompany` 필터(isPublic=false 제외 · `admin/system/external` actorName `'YJLaser'` 마스킹 · note null · changeType 화이트리스트 · 중복 drawing_revision 제외)
- `drawing-revision.service.ts` — `createRevision` 내 타임라인 fire-and-forget `recordChange` 제거 (NaN/NaN·중복 표시 원인 제거)
- `contacts.controller.ts` — `@CurrentUser` 기반 `forCompany` 자동 결정 + 거래처 세션 소유권 검증(403), camelCase 응답 래핑
- 테스트: `contact-timeline.service.spec.ts` 6건 + `contacts.controller.spec.ts` 3건 전부 통과, `drawing-revision.service.spec.ts` 12건 회귀 없음

**AC 결과:** `pnpm build` 성공, 전체 테스트의 기존 실패 59건은 Phase 2 범위 밖(`AutoContactService` 생성자 불일치 등 기존 이슈) — 본 phase가 유발한 실패 없음. index.json phase 2 → `completed`.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"5951d8ac-3d36-4106-a8c5-660f8b848499","total_cost_usd":4.90479675,"usage":{"input_tokens":173,"cache_creation_input_tokens":271009,"cache_read_input_tokens":4367051,"output_tokens":41064,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":271009,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":6,"output_tokens":646,"cache_read_input_tokens":208326,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1329,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1329},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-7[1m]":{"inputTokens":173,"outputTokens":41064,"cacheReadInputTokens":4367051,"cacheCreationInputTokens":271009,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":4.90479675,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"0f6a9320-cf0b-488e-b0d1-13532521e99f"}
